title: calamagrostis royleana
intro: Calamagrostis royleana, also known as Royle's grass or Himalayan feather grass, is a species of grass native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis royleana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Calamagrostis royleana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
